message:
test(core): LabRuntime port of metrics + distributed TLS tests (ft-22x4r)

Port 10 async tests to RuntimeFixture pattern:
- metrics_labruntime.rs: 4 tests (render_prometheus, server_serves_metrics,
  refuses_public_bind, allows_public_bind_with_opt_in)
- distributed_labruntime.rs: 6 TLS handshake tests using public
  build_tls_bundle API (tls/mtls success, untrusted server rejection,
  missing client cert, disallowed client, plaintext rejection)

metrics_labruntime blocked on metrics.rs asupersync migration (cfg-gated).
distributed_labruntime compiles and validates with asupersync-runtime+distributed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
